docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-29-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-12-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CASE SETTLED PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES FOR $2500. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
